recent_additions.reason: Plan v1 winner: +14.3% PnL ($1496.34 vs $1308.65 baseline), Sharpe 1.456, 330 trades, PF 1.571, max DD ~1.68%. Vol regime transition signal (12/96 period rolling std ratio - 1). Run IDs: standalone 20260407-195135-a6102c78, integrated 20260407-195825-2d03834e.

Beats baseline Sharpe 1.46 vs 1.06 (+38%), PnL $1496 vs $1309 (+14.3%), trades 330 vs 498 (more selective), max DD 1.68% vs 2.44% (-31%). cf_funding_extreme and cf_return_skew were REJECT in individual tests. ETAP 3: Vol term spread feature improves PnL +14.3% ($1496 vs $1309), Sharpe +38% (1.46 vs 1.06), drawdown -31% (1.68% vs 2.44%). Long PnL +84% improvement. Feature cf_vol_term_spread filters vol contraction regimes effectively.
Baseline v1: Sharpe 1.056, +13.1%, 498 trades, max DD 2.44%, PF 1.305. Full history 2021-03 to 2026-03.
